title: cotyledon breviflora subsp. salzmannii
intro: Cotyledon breviflora subsp. salzmannii, also known as the Mountain Kinnikinnick, is a succulent plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cotyledon breviflora subsp. salzmannii include wound healing, skin protection, and the relief of symptoms associated with digestive issues and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, tinctures, and salves, which are applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
